title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Bonney, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Celestial Dragons as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It can be safely assumed that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dr. vegapunk, and his 6 satellites are up in the Labo-stratum...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Along with the four Seraphim assigned to protect them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it seems likely that they have joined forces...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with Emperor straw hat. His crew has 10 members.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Our advanced guard included...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Three members of CPO. Rob Lucci, Kaku, and Stussy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were also a number of other either pol agents...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fabrio- Stratum

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: LABO- stream

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but it seems like they've been captured in the fabric-stratum by Sentoumaru and his Battalion of Mark III Pacifista.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As the Frontier Dome is currently at 100%...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We can be certain that nobody...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: can get in or out of the Labo- stratum.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Chew

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, we have no way of knowing what has transpired on the interior of the dome in the last day or so.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And where have the researchers and workers of Egghead gone?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They evacuated yesterday...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we have tracked and confirmed the current positions of their ships.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what would we do if they got away? They might know something.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Sink them immedi- lately.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Saturn, your worship, there is one more thing!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: The Glutton, Jewelry, Bonney...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was reported to be on the island too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah... Kuma's daughter... well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We no longer have any use for her, but given that she is just a little girl, you can leave her be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Under- stood!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kizaru- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: BzzT JZT

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We've picked up a transmission from egghead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It appears to be a long range call!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: RING RING RING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: RING RING...

dialogue.speaker: Celestial Dragons
dialogue.text: The Holy Land of Mariejois...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is Mariejois, over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: “The

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Admiral, you have a black transgender snail...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: On your left arm!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yeah...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That means you can listen in!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: The room of authority

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, this is york speaking!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh... it's you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You guys are so rude!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why the heck are you trying to kill me too?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
